title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.180 - Photo identification for election purpose, nondriver identification card not compliant with federal REAL ID Act to be issued
text:
302.180.  Photo identification for election purpose, nondriver identification card not compliant with federal REAL ID Act to be issued. — In the event the state is required to provide a citizen with photo identification acceptable for election purposes, such identification shall be a nondriver identification card that is not compliant with the federal REAL ID Act of 2005.
(L. 2017 H.B. 151 § 1)
